Full-Stack Java and React Developer","external_id":0,"description":"

Our client is looking for a Senior Java Developer to join their engineering team and work on high-impact backend services and applications. This role requires strong Java fundamentals, hands-on experience with Spring, and the ability to operate in a fast-paced, highly technical environment. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams, contribute to scalable architectures, and help drive engineering excellence.


Benefits

• 100% Remote — work from anywhere

• Private healthcare for you, your partner, and your children

• Life insurance

• Paid Time Off (PTO)

• 10–15 public holidays depending on your country

Requirements

• 5+ years of hands-on experience with Core Java and Spring frameworks

• Good English communication skills. (B1+)

• Strong understanding of OOP principles, data structures, and Java collections

• Expertise in building REST APIs

• Experience with relational databases and SQL (Postgres, MySQL, Oracle, etc.)

• Ability to debug and analyze application logs

• Experience with version control tools (Bitbucket, GitLab, Git, etc.)

• Experience with microservices architecture (plus)

• Experience with NoSQL databases (plus)

• Front-end exposure (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React) is a plus

• Experience with Agile methodologies — sprints, Jira stories, ceremonies

• Strong communication and analytical skills

• Ability to work independently and as a collaborative team member

• Creative, effective problem-solving skills

• Experience working in an Agile/Scrum environment


You Will

• Demonstrate strong written and verbal communication

• Potentially guide or support other engineers

• Be comfortable working as an individual contributor when required

Desired Attributes

This role demands a high level of ownership, pace, communication, and execution. It is not a “lifestyle” position. For an ambitious and resilient professional, this can be a career-defining opportunity.

**Cap Match Score at 45** ### G2 — Java + SQL baseline (REQUIRED for the test) If the candidate lacks either: - **Java backend experience** (Spring + REST), OR - **SQL experience** (queries + joins) Then: - **Cap Match Score at 55** > Note: Do not auto-fail if the resume is messy—just cap the score to prevent false high matches. --- ## Step 2 — Weighted Score (0–100) ### A) HackerRank Pass Likelihood (0–55) ✅ highest weight Score based on evidence the candidate can solve timed coding questions. #### A1) Java portion (0–30) - **0–10:** Java listed but weak backend proof; mostly theoretical. - **11–22:** Real Java backend work (Spring + REST), some debugging, decent fundamentals. - **23–30:** Strong fundamentals + clear examples: OOP, collections, data structures, performance, logs, production issues. #### A2) SQL portion (0–25) - **0–8:** “SQL” mentioned but no depth. - **9–18:** Comfortable with joins, filtering, grouping; used in real apps. - **19–25:** Strong SQL: joins + aggregations + subqueries/CTEs + basic performance/debugging. #### A3) Boosters (up to +5 inside Category A, still max 55) Add points if there is evidence of: - HackerRank / CodeSignal / LeetCode / coding assessments - Frequent interview practice or recent coding tests --- ### B) React.js (0–20) ✅ required (not optional) - **0–5:** Very light exposure (minor UI fixes, basic components). - **6–14:** Can build basic features: hooks, state, forms, API integration. - **15–20:** Solid React in production: component architecture, hooks patterns, real feature ownership. --- ### C) Backend Delivery Fit (0–15) Consider: REST API design, microservices familiarity, debugging logs, version control, CI/CD exposure. - **0–5:** Basic - **6–11:** Solid - **12–15:** Strong --- ### D) Communication + Pace/Ownership (0–10) Consider: English B1+ and evidence they thrive in high ownership / fast-paced environments. - **0–3:** Unclear or weak - **4–7:** Fine - **8–10:** Strong communicator + high ownership --- ## Step 3 — Normalization / Caps (must enforce) - If **React is missing** → **score cannot exceed 45** - If **SQL is weak/absent** → **score cannot exceed 55** - If **Java is weak/absent** → **score cannot exceed 55** - If **Java + SQL strong** AND **React present** → allow **80–100** --- ## High Match Indicators (85–100) - Strong Java backend (Spring, REST, logs/debugging) - Strong SQL (joins + grouping + real DB work) - Some real React (at least building/maintaining features) - Evidence of coding tests or ability under time pressure ## Low Match Indicators (<60) - Missing React OR weak SQL OR weak Java fundamentals - Mostly frontend-only or non-backend background - No evidence they can handle timed coding assessments --- ## Recommended Output Schema (for consistent agent responses) Return: - `match_score` (1–100) - `likely_pass_hackerrank` (`high | medium | low`) + 1–2 reasons - `react_level` (`none | light | solid`) - `top_evidence` (3 bullets referencing resume signals) - `risks` (1–3 bullets) - `missing_info` (only what matters, e.g., salary/notice period)","linked_inmail_subject":"{{project_title}} opening","last_housekeep_at":1772725201916,"reply_agent_context":null,"_company":{"id":8,"created_at":1763333163560,"updated_at":1767042484150,"name":"ROC 360","display_name":"ROC 360","is_visible":true,"description_html":"

Roc360 is a financial services and asset management platform serving residential real-estate investors across the United States. The company connects fragmented loan markets with institutional capital through a nationwide, branchless network of originators, brokers, and in-house sales teams. Roc360 provides a full suite of business-purpose loan products—including residential transitional bridge loans and rental loans—along with end-to-end services that support investors who buy, renovate, resell, or rent properties.


Founded in 2014 and headquartered in New York City, Roc360 has grown to more than 400 team members across three continents and five countries. With the ability to originate loans in over 45 states and Washington, D.C., and a strong technology-enabled distribution model, the company has funded more than $15 billion in loans since inception.

We are looking for a Mid–Senior Full Stack Developer with a strong front-end focus and solid experience in React, JavaScript, and TypeScript to build clean, scalable, and high-performing web applications.

This role is front-end first. You will primarily own UI development and user experience, while collaborating closely with backend engineers. Backend knowledge is important for context and integration, but this is not a backend-heavy role.


Key Responsibilities

  • Build and maintain modern front-end applications using React
  • Write clean, reusable, and maintainable JavaScript/TypeScript code
  • Translate product and design requirements into intuitive user experiences
  • Integrate front-end applications with RESTful APIs
  • Ensure high standards for UI performance, accessibility, and responsiveness
  • Participate in code reviews and promote front-end best practices
  • Contribute to automated testing (unit and UI tests)
  • Collaborate with backend, product, and design teams to deliver cohesive solutions

Requirements

  • 3–6+ years of experience in web development
  • Strong proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript
  • Solid to advanced experience with React.js (hooks, component architecture, state management)
  • Strong understanding of HTML, CSS, and responsive design
  • Experience integrating front-end applications with REST APIs
  • Comfortable working with Git and collaborative workflows
  • Clear communication skills and the ability to work independently

Nice to Have (Pluses, Not Required)

  • Experience with Node.js and basic backend development
  • Familiarity with Next.js
  • Experience with testing tools (Jest, Cypress, Playwright)
  • Exposure to CI/CD pipelines
  • Basic experience with Docker and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
  • Interest in performance optimization, accessibility, and UX best practices

Sunrise Integration is a U.S.-based digital agency and software services firm that specializes in e-commerce development, custom integrations, and enterprise software solutions. Headquartered in Pasadena, California, the company offers expertise across platforms such as Shopify Plus (including online storefronts, POS/retail setups and B2B ecommerce), as well as CRM/ERP integration, custom APIs, mobile apps and data migrations. Their team has more than two decades of experience in digital commerce, and they serve clients across multiple industries—working on complex projects involving cloud migrations, headless commerce, logistics integration and growth strategy.


For candidates, joining Sunrise Integration means working in a smaller, expert-driven agency environment (employees under 50) where you’ll engage in end-to-end solutions: from strategy and design to development and integration. You’ll be part of a team that values technical depth, client collaboration, and scalable solutions, and you’ll have opportunities to work on high-impact e-commerce builds and system integrations.

About BetterWay Devs

We connect LATAM engineers with North American companies for long-term roles—better work, better benefits, real career growth. Join our talent pool so we can move fast when a matching position opens.


Roles We Often Place

  • Full-Stack: Node.js/React, Python/React, Java/Angular
  • Backend: Node.js, Java, Python, .NET
  • Frontend: React, Vue, Angular
  • Data / Analytics: SQL, Python, BI
  • Mobile: React Native, Android, iOS
  • DevOps / Cloud: AWS, GCP, Azure
  • QA / Automation: Playwright, Cypress, Jest



Core Requirements

  • 3+ years professional software development (mid/senior).
  • Solid skills in your main stack (clean code, testing, Git).
  • Proven experience shipping to production in agile teams.
  • English communication: capable of daily standups, async updates, and client calls with US teams.
  • Target level: B2+ (Upper-Intermediate) or higher for most roles.
  • Reliable internet, remote discipline, and clear written communication.


Nice to Have

  • Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure), CI/CD, monitoring.
  • Architecture patterns (microservices, event-driven, DDD).
  • Portfolio, OSS, or public repos.


Why BetterWay Devs

  • Better work: Impactful projects with stable North American clients.
  • Transparent Model: We are not a traditional nearshore company, we are transparent.

About the Role

We’re looking for full-stack Product Engineer who will architect and build core aspects of the Inventive’s platform, shape our technical direction from day one, and own the end-to-end experience across the product.


We are NOT looking for someone who only wants Jira tickets, polished specs, or a big engineering team to lean on. If you need clear instructions, rigid structure, or overt amount of processes, this isn’t the role for you.

If you’re a high-agency rockstar who thrives in ambiguity, moves fast, and loves turning ideas into elegant, scalable systems that customers love—you will thrive here.


This role is a high leverage role in the following ways:

  • Strategic Impact – you will work directly with the founders to influence technical and product direction, deciding how we scale our platform and what bets we make.
  • End-to-End Ownership – Take ideas from rough concepts to production-ready systems – UI/UX, frontend components, and everything critical for to ensure our product is fast, reliable, and a joy to use.
  • Customer-Driven Development – Talk to customers, understand their needs, and turn feedback into technical solutions that directly impact their growth.


Responsibilities

Responsibilities include:

  • Develop product features across our platform, from technical design to implementation.
  • Build solutions end-to-end spanning the frontend (Typescript, React, Next.js) and backend (Python/Django/APIs), service and database layers.
  • Be able to build reliable user interfaces, reusable components, manage app state and optimize API calls.
  • Collaborate with engineering and design teams to build a robust, world class product that delights users.
  • Write high-quality, well-documented, and testable code while moving fast to deliver outcomes.
  • Maintain and optimize our codebase for performance and user experience.

Required Skills

  • Strong experience (5-8 years) in a full stack engineering role.
  • Strong frontend development skills (Typescript, React, Tailwind CSS)
  • Obsess over building the product with best UX and quality.
  • Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, excellent communication and collaboration skills.
  • Demonstrate ownership and thrive in unstructured environments.
  • Ability to move quickly and meet tight deadlines.

Strong Plus

  • Hands-on experience with Language Models and AI/ML integrations (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.)
  • Experience with Redis for caching and session management.
  • Enterprise software development experience with security and compliance considerations

Summary

We are seeking a Senior iOS Mobile Developer to join our Specialized App team and help deliver premium mobile experiences that support Specialized’s rider-focused initiatives. In this role, you will design and build best-in-class iOS applications using Swift and applying event-driven programming patterns to ensure responsive, efficient, and scalable solutions. You’ll work closely with product managers, designers, and backend teams to develop apps that engage riders and elevate their Specialized experience.


How You'll Make a Difference

· Develop, enhance, and maintain iOS applications using Swift, SwiftUI, Combine, and modern event-driven architectures

· Design and implement efficient caching strategies to improve app performance, responsiveness, and offline reliability

· Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product managers, designers, and backend engineers to define and deliver seamless user experiences

· Lead technical discussions, mentor junior developers, and champion best practices in coding standards, app architecture, testing, and performance optimization

· Analyze complex technical problems, propose scalable solutions, breakdown features into manageable tasks, and lead implementation efforts

· Contribute to the long-term architectural vision for Specialized’s mobile platforms, helping standardize development approaches and tooling

· Continuously evaluate new technologies and frameworks to improve app reliability, maintainability, and overall rider experience

· Help drive consistent use of event-driven patterns across mobile systems to improve modularity, testing, and responsiveness


How You Win

· 8+ years of software development experience

· 5+ years of experience with iOS Development

· Deep expertise in Swift and modern iOS development, with hands-on experience building and maintaining apps using SwiftUI and Combine

· Strong understanding of event-driven programming principles and how to design reactive, scalable systems

· Solid experience designing and implementing caching strategies and usage of databases (e.g. Core Data) for better performance and offline use

· Experience working with mobile app architectures such as MVVM, MVC, MVP or Clean Architecture

· Ability to break down complex problems, evaluate trade-offs, and deliver elegant, maintainable solutions

· Strong communication and collaboration skills, comfortable networking with technical and non-technical stakeholders

· Experience mentoring others and setting technical direction within a mobile development team

Summary

We are seeking a Staff Android Developer to guide the architecture, design, and technical evolution of Specialized’s rider-facing mobile applications. In this role, you will provide technical leadership across multiple teams, mentor senior developers, and partner closely with Product Management and Design leadership to deliver premium, scalable, and responsive experiences. You will apply deep expertise in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Coroutines, caching strategies, and event-driven programming to solve complex technical challenges and set the standard for mobile development across the organization.


How You'll Make a Difference

· Develop, enhance, and maintain Android applications using Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Coroutines, and modern event-driven architectures

· Design and implement efficient caching strategies to improve app performance, responsiveness, and offline reliability

· Define architectural patterns and technical standards for Specialized’s Android applications, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and high performance

· Mentor and guide senior developers, reviewing technical designs and code, and helping elevate team capabilities through coaching and feedback

· Collaborate deeply with Product Managers, Designers, and Engineering leadership to translate business needs into technical strategies and solutions

· Be a strong voice in technical planning, evaluating trade-offs, and making recommendations that influence product direction and system design

· Design and implement advanced event-driven architectures and robust caching strategies to optimize performance and user experience

· Analyze complex technical problems, propose scalable solutions, breakdown features into manageable tasks, and lead implementation efforts

· Drive the adoption of modern frameworks and best practices such as Jetpack Compose, Coroutines, MVVM, and modular architecture

· Analyze and solve complex, ambiguous problems where conceptual thinking and independent judgment are required

· Champion cross-team initiatives to improve development processes, shared tools, and mobile infrastructure, contributing to broader organizational goals

· Represent mobile engineering in technical forums, providing thought leadership and aligning mobile strategies with Specialized’s overall business objectives


How You Win

· 12+ years of software development experience

· 8+ years of Android Software Development

· 3+ years of leading teams technically

· Deep expertise in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Coroutines, and Android event-driven programming patterns

· Strong architectural skills with a proven track record of designing modular, scalable, and efficient mobile systems

· Hands-on experience implementing complex caching solutions to enhance performance and offline reliability

· Proven ability to mentor and grow senior developers, provide technical leadership, and foster a culture of quality and innovation

· Excellent collaboration and communication skills, able to influence and align diverse stakeholders across Product, Design, and Engineering

· Demonstrated ability to work on significant, unique challenges requiring conceptual and strategic thinking

· Recognized internally or externally as a subject matter expert in Android development or mobile architecture

SLTWTR is hiring a Senior Frontend Engineer to build high-performance, scalable, and maintainable frontend experiences across our Shopify ecosystem. This role requires deep vanilla JavaScript expertise—you’ll build interactions, components, and controllers from scratch with minimal dependencies (no heavy framework reliance). You’ll partner with Product Owners, designers, and backend engineers to deliver premium brand experiences and contribute to SLTWTR’s shared component library and engineering standards.

What You’ll Do

  • Vanilla JavaScript Engineering: Design and implement complex UI behavior and frontend logic using vanilla JS with minimal dependencies.
  • Reusable Component Systems: Build modular, reusable UI systems (e.g., cart logic, filtering, modals, controllers) with clean architecture and performance in mind.
  • Shopify Theme Development: Deliver highly customized Shopify themes using Liquid, metafields, and Shopify APIs (plus related external APIs when needed).
  • Shopify Extensions: Develop and maintain Checkout UI Extensions and other platform extensions (e.g., App Blocks, Customer Account extensions) to improve customer experience.
  • Sprint Delivery: Collaborate with Product Owners and designers to scope features, define UI states, estimate work accurately, and execute reliably.
  • Code Quality: Ensure readable, maintainable, well-documented code and consistent frontend patterns across client projects.

Required Qualifications (Must-Have)

  • 5+ years professional frontend development experience
  • Comfortable working independently in a remote, sprint-based environment
  • Deep vanilla JavaScript proficiency building complex UI logic without relying on heavy frameworks (React/Vue/etc.)
  • Shopify platform mastery, including:
  • Expert-level Liquid and theme/template development
  • Proven experience building Shopify Checkout UI Extensions and other platform extensions (e.g., App Blocks)
  • Strong understanding of Shopify best practices for scalable, maintainable implementations
  • Component engineering experience creating reusable modular systems (e.g., Web Components or similar framework-agnostic approaches)
  • Styling & performance proficiency, including:
  • Modern CSS (and preprocessors where applicable)
  • Utility-first frameworks like Tailwind CSS
  • Browser APIs, event handling, state patterns
  • Performance profiling tools (Lighthouse, Chrome DevTools)

Nice to Have

  • Experience with Shopify Storefront API and headless/hybrid approaches
  • Familiarity with Shopify CLI and strong Git/version-control workflows
  • A portfolio showcasing complex, high-performance frontend work

Reporting

  • Primary: Operations Lead
  • During sprints: Delivery Lead / Product Owner

The Role

We’re hiring an Engineering Manager to lead and grow our core engineering team.

This is an execution-focused engineering management role centered on people leadership, delivery, and accountability. While strong technical skills are important, success in this role comes from effectively managing engineers, building a healthy team culture, and ensuring work is planned and delivered with quality and predictability.

You’ll report into engineering leadership and partner closely with Product and technical leaders to ensure alignment, execution, and delivery.

What You’ll Do

  • Own team health, performance, and professional development
  • Set clear expectations around ownership, accountability, and quality
  • Establish and run lightweight processes that improve planning, delivery, and predictability
  • Raise the bar on technical planning and execution without unnecessary overhead
  • Partner with Product to scope, prioritize, and deliver work effectively
  • Hire and onboard engineers as the team grows

What Success Looks Like

Engineering operates with clear ownership, thoughtful planning, and predictable delivery. Engineers are engaged in product discussions, releases happen with confidence, and quality issues, regressions, and rework are consistently reduced. The broader business trusts engineering commitments and timelines.

What We’re Looking For

  • Experience managing engineers in a product-centric SaaS organization
  • Proven ability to introduce and run effective process in low-process environments
  • Background in startups or lean, execution-oriented companies
  • Strong business judgment and interpersonal skills
  • Comfortable leading without layers of management
  • Experience with US-based tech companies; US-based, ideally West Coast
  • Past experience as a developer

This Role Is Best Suited For Someone Who

  • Enjoys people management and coaching as a core responsibility
  • Has a background in development
  • Is comfortable owning process, planning, and execution
  • Brings a strong, well-informed point of view while remaining collaborative

How You Lead

  • Drives clarity and alignment in ambiguous situations
  • Makes thoughtful decisions and moves teams forward
  • Communicates clearly and respectfully across functions
  • Holds themselves and others accountable in a calm, professional way

We are seeking an experienced Senior Fullstack Developer with expertise in Ruby on Rails and React, who will play a key role in building and maintaining integrations across our product ecosystem. This role will focus primarily on developing and managing integrations using Workato as our iPaaS provider, while contributing to the broader full-stack development of our web applications.

The ideal candidate has a strong foundation in backend and frontend development, deep knowledge of API design and authentication, and is excited to work with integration platforms to connect systems and automate workflows. You’ll collaborate closely with internal teams and occasionally with customers to gather integration requirements and ensure successful deployments.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain full-stack web applications using Ruby on Rails and React.
  • Lead the design and implementation of new integration touchpoints across the application.

Company: PlanIT Geo

PlanIT Geo provides innovative software and services for urban forestry, GIS, and green infrastructure management. Looking for a technically skilled Customer Support Specialist (Tier 3) who can serve as the last line of defense for complex technical issues involving databases, GIS data, and software configuration.


Key Responsibilities

  • Strong SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar)
  • Experience with complex multi-layered technical problems
  • GIS data formats and tools (Shapefiles, GeoJSON, QGIS, ArcGIS) or willingness to learn
  • Familiarity with APIs, REST, JSON, HTTP
  • Experience with ticketing systems (Zendesk, HubSpot, Jira)


Nice-to-Haves

  • PostgreSQL with PostGIS
  • Background in GIS, geography, environmental science, urban forestry
  • Python, JavaScript, or Bash scripting
  • Cloud/DevOps (AWS, Docker, CI/CD)
  • Second language fluency
